2604.26229.title: Comparative Analysis of AutoML and BiLSTM Models for Cyberbullying Detection on Indonesian Instagram Comments
2604.26229.paper_summary: This study compares machine learning and deep learning approaches for cyberbullying detection in Indonesian-language Instagram comments. Using a balanced dataset of 650 comments labeled as Bullying and Non-Bullying, the study evaluates Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, and Support Vector Machine with TF-IDF features, as well as BiLSTM and BiLSTM with Bahdanau Attention. A preprocessing pipeline tailored to informal Indonesian text is applied, including slang normalization, stopword removal, and stemming. The results show that Logistic Regression performs best among the machine learning models, while BiLSTM with Attention achieves the strongest overall deep learning performance. The findings highlight the value of domain-specific preprocessing and show that although deep learning captures contextual patterns more effectively, machine learning remains a competitive option for resource-constrained deployments.
2604.26229.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究比較了機器學習和深度學習方法在印尼語Instagram評論中的網路霸凌檢測。<lb/>使用一個包含650條標註為霸凌和非霸凌的平衡數據集，該研究評估了使用TF-IDF特徵的朴素貝葉斯、邏輯回歸和支持向量機，以及BiLSTM和帶有Bahdanau注意力的BiLSTM。<lb/>針對非正式印尼文本應用的預處理管道包括俚語正規化、停用詞移除和詞幹提取。<lb/>結果顯示，在機器學習模型中，邏輯回歸表現最佳，而帶有注意力的BiLSTM則實現了最強的整體深度學習性能。<lb/>研究結果突顯了特定領域預處理的價值，並顯示儘管深度學習更有效地捕捉上下文模式，機器學習仍然是資源受限部署的競爭選擇。
2604.26229.author: Raihana Adelia Putri et.al.
2604.26229.authors: Raihana Adelia Putri, Aisyah Musfirah, Anggi Puspita Ningrum, Luluk Muthoharoh, Ardika Satria, Martin Clinton Tosima Manullang
